name: should create a rushing yards split by week
description: Test case for should create a rushing yards split by week
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year), "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(rush_yds) AS team_rush_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" as materialized (select "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_rush_yds_from_plays) as team_rush_yds_from_plays, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."week" from "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" group by "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."year", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."week"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797"."ry" AS "week_projected_rush_yds_0", "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_rush_yds_from_plays" AS "team_rush_yds_from_plays_0", "player_years"."year", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_weeks"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "projections_index" as "t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797" on "t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797.year = player_years.year and t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797.year IN (2020,2021,2022,2023) and t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797.week = player_years_weeks.week and "t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797"."sourceid" = 18 and "t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e.year = player_years.year and "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."year" in (2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e.week = player_years_weeks.week left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats.week = player_years_weeks.week and t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats.year = player_years.year group by player.fname, player.lname, "t90a3792437f300e9c5661a5811178797"."ry", "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_yds_from_plays", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_rush_yds_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
